---
title: "Memoranda of the Parishes of Hursley and North Baddesley, in the County of Southampton"
---

## Memoranda of the Parishes of Hursley and North Baddesley, in the County of Southampton

**Author:** The Rev. John Marsh
**Date:** 1808
**Imprint:** Winchester: Robbins

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
